# Image

An image component with built-in support for fallbacks, object-fit, and border radius styling. Wraps the native `<img>` element with Chakra UI style props.

## Import

```jsx
import { Image } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `src` | `string` | - | The image source URL |
| `alt` | `string` | - | Alternative text for accessibility (required) |
| `fallback` | `React.ReactElement` | - | Fallback element to display while image is loading or if it fails |
| `fallbackSrc` | `string` | - | Fallback image source URL |
| `objectFit` | `"contain" \| "cover" \| "fill" \| "none" \| "scale-down"` | - | How the image should be resized to fit its container |
| `borderRadius` | `string` | - | Border radius of the image (e.g., `"md"`, `"full"`, `"8px"`) |
| `width` | `string \| number` | - | Width of the image |
| `height` | `string \| number` | - | Height of the image |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the underlying element |

All standard Chakra UI style props are also supported.

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<Image src="/photo.jpg" alt="A scenic landscape" />
```

### With object fit

```jsx
<Image
  src="/profile.jpg"
  alt="User profile"
  objectFit="cover"
  width="200px"
  height="200px"
  borderRadius="full"
/>
```

### With fallback source

```jsx
<Image
  src="/user-avatar.jpg"
  fallbackSrc="/default-avatar.png"
  alt="User avatar"
  borderRadius="full"
/>
```

### With fallback element

```jsx
<Image
  src="/slow-loading-image.jpg"
  alt="Content image"
  fallback={<Skeleton width="300px" height="200px" />}
/>
```

### Responsive sizing

```jsx
<Image
  src="/hero.jpg"
  alt="Hero banner"
  width="100%"
  maxH="400px"
  objectFit="cover"
  borderRadius="lg"
/>
```

## Features

- Renders a native `<img>` element with Chakra UI styling capabilities
- Supports fallback images via `fallbackSrc` for broken image sources
- Supports fallback elements via `fallback` for custom loading/error states
- Supports `objectFit` for controlling image resize behavior
- Supports all Chakra UI style props including `borderRadius`, `width`, `height`, etc.
- Forwards refs to the underlying DOM element
